title: Server705
description: Official Vanilla+, Performance and Quality of life modpack for the server of Skit705 on Twitch.
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e5ff2a58d9345c6299605e8e82dd593413574bf2_0.webp)
# Official Modpack built for Skit705's Server!

## Who is this modpack for?

- Players of the server made by Skit705
- People wanting the highest performance even with shaders.
- People wanting the smoothest experience when exploring and claiming land on the Server.

### What does this modpack include?

- A multitude of optimisation mods
- Quality of life mods
- Minimap And UI for claiming land and navigation
- Some aesthetically pleasing resouce packs and UI mods.
   
### What are some of it's features?

- Freecam (Detachable flying camera like spectator mode)
- Shader support (Comes pre installed with some low end shaders)
- Distant Horizons (Chunk caching mod for enhanceed render distance)
- Zoom keybind and Handheld dynamic lighting
  
### How do I join this "Server705"?
- The modpack comes preloaded with the server IP already inputted.
- To get whitelisted you must apply via Skit705's discord server.
